title: Buggy’s Cannon Threatens Orange Town
description: On pages 8–11, Buggy’s crew threatens Orange Town with overwhelming force, turning the town itself into a hostage.
scene: Buggy’s pirates rely on spectacle and destruction, while Luffy, Zoro, and Nami are forced to react under pressure.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: DON'T MAKE ME LAUGH! YOU THREE ARE ABOUT TO DIE!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: NO WAY! I'm not gonna die!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: And just HOW do you intend to clobber me NOW?

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: WHAT? I'm not going anywhere! We're trying to save you!

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: THEYLLY WILL YOU THE MOMENT WE GO!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: He's deserving us!? Urgh! That's why I hate pirates! Now I have to come up with an escape plan!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: RORDONDA ZOLO! YOU WON'T GET AWAY THAT EASILY!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: AHHA HA HA! ZOLO'S RUNNING AWAY!!

summary: The part shows how Buggy rules through fear, while the Straw Hats begin breaking that fear through defiance and improvisation.
